texts.orig: CONTRACT RATES 2025

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Contract  agreement between Ol Tukai  Lodge and Bountiful Safaris , Where by OL TUKAI LODGE Agreed to grant the Operator Bountiful Safaris, the following rates on the terms and conditions here with.
texts.text: Contract  agreement between Ol Tukai  Lodge and Bountiful Safaris , Where by OL TUKAI LODGE Agreed to grant the Operator Bountiful Safaris, the following rates on the terms and conditions here with.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Rates& Seasons
texts.text: Rates& Seasons

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates herein are in US$ (United States Dollars) and are quoted per person per night on Full-board basis & Half Board basis , inclusive of VAT, Government Levy and service charge, net and non-commissionable.
texts.text: Rates herein are in US$ (United States Dollars) and are quoted per person per night on Full-board basis & Half Board basis , inclusive of VAT, Government Levy and service charge, net and non-commissionable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Circuit discount :  Groups/Series staying at Eka Hotel & Ol Tukai will enjoy a further discount on your contract rates as follows: Eka Hotel 5% and Ol Tukai 5%
texts.text: Circuit discount :  Groups/Series staying at Eka Hotel & Ol Tukai will enjoy a further discount on your contract rates as follows: Eka Hotel 5% and Ol Tukai 5%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NB: Half board reduction of USD 9 per person per night
texts.text: NB: Half board reduction of USD 9 per person per night

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILD POLICY
texts.text: CHILD POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 0 - 1.99 Years -Infant ,2 -11.99 Years ,Children, Above 12 years adults
texts.text: 0 - 1.99 Years -Infant ,2 -11.99 Years ,Children, Above 12 years adults

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) One child in a single room -Single room rate will apply
texts.text: One child in a single room -Single room rate will apply

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Two children in a room, the charge is equivalent to a single rate. i.e 75 % of the double rate.
texts.text: Two children in a room, the charge is equivalent to a single rate. i.e 75 % of the double rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Three children in a room the rate will be a single plus the child rate (equivalent to a full double rate.)
texts.text: Three children in a room the rate will be a single plus the child rate (equivalent to a full double rate.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) Four children in a room; the charge will be equivalent to a full twin room
texts.text: Four children in a room; the charge will be equivalent to a full twin room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) When we have one adult and one child in a room; charged as a single and a Child sharing.
texts.text: When we have one adult and one child in a room; charged as a single and a Child sharing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f) Adult sharing with two children, the rate charged will be the equivalent to a full twin room.
texts.text: Adult sharing with two children, the rate charged will be the equivalent to a full twin room.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: g) One adult sharing a room with three children; the rate is twin plus child sharing.
texts.text: One adult sharing a room with three children; the rate is twin plus child sharing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: h) Two adults sharing with one child the rate to be charged as a twin plus child sharing rate i.e 50 % of an Adult in double
texts.text: Two adults sharing with one child the rate to be charged as a twin plus child sharing rate i.e 50 % of an Adult in double

texts.orig: 2.0 Ground  Package Rates
texts.text: 2.0 Ground  Package Rates

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Rates &Seasons
texts.text: Rates &Seasons

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates herein are in US$ (United States Dollars) and are quoted per person per night on Ground Package, inclusive of  VAT,  Government  Levy  and  service  charge, net  and non-commissionable.
texts.text: Rates herein are in US$ (United States Dollars) and are quoted per person per night on Ground Package, inclusive of  VAT,  Government  Levy  and  service  charge, net  and non-commissionable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Package rates include Full-board Accommodation; return airstrip transfers, two game drives per day.
texts.text: Package rates include Full-board Accommodation; return airstrip transfers, two game drives per day.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILDPOLICY: 70% of adult sharing
texts.text: CHILDPOLICY: 70% of adult sharing

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT
texts.text: PAYMENT

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) If the operator enjoys credit facilities with Ol Tukai Lodge, the operator shall make payments in full at the appropriate rates within thirty days of the presentation of an invoice by Ol Tukai Lodge. If the operator does not enjoy credit facilities with Ol Tukai Lodge, the operator shall make payments in full at the appropriate rates at least sixty days before the accommodation date.
texts.text: If the operator enjoys credit facilities with Ol Tukai Lodge, the operator shall make payments in full at the appropriate rates within thirty days of the presentation of an invoice by Ol Tukai Lodge. If the operator does not enjoy credit facilities with Ol Tukai Lodge, the operator shall make payments in full at the appropriate rates at least sixty days before the accommodation date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) In the event that payment in full is not made within the time specified, Ol Tukai Lodge may at its discretion terminate  this  agreement  forthwith  and  thereafter  shall  have  no  obligation  to provide  rooms to the operator.
texts.text: In the event that payment in full is not made within the time specified, Ol Tukai Lodge may at its discretion terminate  this  agreement  forthwith  and  thereafter  shall  have  no  obligation  to provide  rooms to the operator.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Ol Tukai Lodge Credit Department within 14 days of the date of receipt of that invoice, and only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the payment of that invoice.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Ol Tukai Lodge Credit Department within 14 days of the date of receipt of that invoice, and only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the payment of that invoice.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The operator confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the operator and Ol Tukai Lodge and the operator shall not in any circumstance divulge or permit to be divulged in  this Agreement or its contents to any person.
texts.text: The operator confirms and agrees that this Agreement is confidential to the operator and Ol Tukai Lodge and the operator shall not in any circumstance divulge or permit to be divulged in  this Agreement or its contents to any person.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: 2 | P a ge
texts.text: 2 | P a ge

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: MISCELLANEOUS
texts.text: MISCELLANEOUS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) This agreement shall be deemed rejected if the operator fails to return the copies here of duly Signed to Ol Tukai Lodge within 30 days of the date hereof.
texts.text: This agreement shall be deemed rejected if the operator fails to return the copies here of duly Signed to Ol Tukai Lodge within 30 days of the date hereof.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed on behalf of Ol Tukai Lodge and the operator.
texts.text: Amendments to this agreement shall be valid only if made in writing and signed on behalf of Ol Tukai Lodge and the operator.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) The waiver of any of the terms and condition of this agreement on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions of any further occasions.
texts.text: The waiver of any of the terms and condition of this agreement on any occasion shall not be deemed a waiver of such terms and conditions of any further occasions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) This agreement shall be governed in all respects by the law of the Republic of Kenya.
texts.text: This agreement shall be governed in all respects by the law of the Republic of Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) Ol Tukai Lodge reserves the right to give one month's notice for closing, renovation, and refurbishment, etc without penalty.
texts.text: Ol Tukai Lodge reserves the right to give one month's notice for closing, renovation, and refurbishment, etc without penalty.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f) Complimentary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders on the basis of 1room per 15 paying persons, provided it is pre-booked and confirmed.
texts.text: Complimentary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders on the basis of 1room per 15 paying persons, provided it is pre-booked and confirmed.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PRICES
texts.text: PRICES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Ol Tukai Lodge may at its discretion change its rates by not less than one month's notice in writing to the operator, after the specified rates.
texts.text: Ol Tukai Lodge may at its discretion change its rates by not less than one month's notice in writing to the operator, after the specified rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) In  the  event  of  a  change  in  the  value  of  Kenya  Shillings  by  more  than  5%  by  way  of  devaluation  or  currency fluctuation, Ol  Tukai Lodge  may  at  its discretion increase the specified rates proportionately by the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the rate of devaluation.
texts.text: In  the  event  of  a  change  in  the  value  of  Kenya  Shillings  by  more  than  5%  by  way  of  devaluation  or  currency fluctuation, Ol  Tukai Lodge  may  at  its discretion increase the specified rates proportionately by the amount of such devaluation and with effect from the rate of devaluation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) In the event of any change of Governments taxes, Ol Tukai Lodge reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly.
texts.text: In the event of any change of Governments taxes, Ol Tukai Lodge reserves the right to adjust these rates accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATIONAND NO-SHOW FEES
texts.text: CANCELLATIONAND NO-SHOW FEES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) For cancellations received from date of booking to 61 days prior to arrival incur a 20%cancellation fee.
texts.text: For cancellations received from date of booking to 61 days prior to arrival incur a 20%cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) For cancellations received from 60 days to 31 days prior to arrival incur a 50% cancellation fee.
texts.text: For cancellations received from 60 days to 31 days prior to arrival incur a 50% cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f) For cancellations received from 30 days prior to the booked date of arrival incur a 100%cancellation fee.
texts.text: For cancellations received from 30 days prior to the booked date of arrival incur a 100%cancellation fee.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: g) NB: Additional fees may apply for cancellation of airline tickets and other services which will be advised as soon as possible after receipt of the written cancellation. Special cancellation terms may be applicable for group bookings or exclusive use of a lodge will be advised at time of booking.
texts.text: NB: Additional fees may apply for cancellation of airline tickets and other services which will be advised as soon as possible after receipt of the written cancellation. Special cancellation terms may be applicable for group bookings or exclusive use of a lodge will be advised at time of booking.
